expected_behavior: Recognize vitamin or nutrient lab content, open review-before-save language, and never mark unrelated.
Recognize flagged bloodwork/lab result content and require review before save.
Recognize clinical bloodwork or lab report shape and require review before save.
Recognize positive/flagged clinical report content and require review before save.
Recognize pathology or biopsy content and require record review before save.
Recognize colonoscopy/pathology content and require record review before save.
Recognize colonoscopy findings and require record review before save.
Recognize pathology diagnosis text and require record review before save.
Treat clinical-report-like content as health-related, ask for review, and avoid unsupported diagnosis.
